name: A Hero’s Journey
description: Complete the main story mission of the game, including defeating the Light of Ruin and becoming Pokémon Champion.
objectives: Complete the main story mission of the game, including defeating the Light of Ruin and becoming Pokémon Champion.

objectives: Play Cloud Burst in the Game Corner and collect 3000 Coins in a single day

objectives: Participate in a fight against two Black Ferrothorn Goons in the streets of Antisis City

name: A Rift in Space

objectives: Rescue a little girl in Rift Cave
